w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: At a Meeting of the Directors of the Company duly convened and held at the address of:
at which a quorum was present and acting throughout, the following Resolution were duly passed by the Board of Directors:

Securities trading account(s) (the “Account(s)”) be opened and maintained with CANTON MUTUAL FINANCIAL LIMITED (“CMF” ) in accordance with such terms and conditions which CMF may from time to time prescribe for the Account(s), the Customer Information Form, Cash Account Agreement* and other supplementary documents (“Cash Account Agreement”)* of CMF had been tabled and considered by the Directors.
of the following person(s) be and is/are hereby appointed as Authorized Person(s) of the Company and be authorized (where necessary, to affix the common seal of the Company thereon):
agreements, consents, letter of instruction or other documents required by CMF for the settlement of securities transaction with CMF or in connection with the opening of the Account(s
to give orders or trading instructions to CMF, whether in writing, verbally or otherwise, in respect of any transactions of the Account(s) for and on behalf of and in the name of the Company.
to withdraw or transfer ant money, securities, collateral or the property into or out of the Account(s); and
written endorsements and documents necessary or proper to affect the authority conferred by these resolutions.
Without prejudice to the paragraph 2 above, the mentioned Cash Account Agreement* of CMF be approved and any

of the Directors/Authorized Persons (at least two Directors be appointed as Authorized Signatories unless the company has only single Director) be and are hereby authorized to sign or execute on the Company’s behalf the Cash Account Agreement/Margin Client Agreement* and sign, execute and complete all other relevant documents on the Company’s behalf in connection with the opening and operation of the Account(s), including without limitation, the Customer Information Form.
The Company shall notify CMF from time to time of any changes which may render the information in the Customer Information Form untrue or misleading.
CMF be provided with any documents which it may reasonably

in connection with the opening and operation of the Account(s), including, without limitation, copies of the certificate of incorporation, business registration certificate, the memorandum and articles of association or other constitutional documents of the Company, financial statements of the Company and certified extracts of any resolution relating to the Account(s).

I, the undersigned, DO HEREBY CERTIFY that the foregoing is a true copy of the Resolutions which (a) were duly passed in accordance with the Memorandum and Articles of Association or other constitutional documents of the
Company, (b) have been duly recorded in the minutes book of the Company, and (c) remain in full force and effect, no action having been taken to rescind or amend the said Resolutions.
Duly Authorized for and on behalf of the Company
召開董事局會議，期間具備會議所需的合法人數，並且正式通過以下決議案：
在誠港金融股份有限公司
開立和維持的證券交易
均按誠港不時規定有關
戶的條款和條件開立和維持；會議上展示
位下述之人士為公司的授權人士並獲授權代表公司
在需要時加蓋公司印章
所要求的任何與全部協議、同意書、指示函或其他文件；
以書面、口頭或其他方式就
戶的交易代表公司或以公司名義給予
任何資金、證券、抵押品或其他財產；
作出、簽署並交付按本決議授權生效所需要或適用的任何與全部書面背書及文件。
已獲批准，在此授權任何
授權至少兩位公司董事，除非公司只屬單一董事制
代表本公司簽署或簽訂現金
戶協議，並代表本公司簽署、簽訂及填妥有關開立
戶的全部及其他相關文件，包括但不限於客戶資料表。
任何可使客戶資料表中資料變得不實或誤導的任何變更。
誠港可獲提供其認為與開立
戶及運作有關要求的任何文件，包括但不限於公司註冊證明書、商業登記證、本公司組織章程大綱及細則或其他組織文件的副本、本公司財務報表和有關
下述簽署人現證明前述為
依照據公司的章程大綱及細則或其他組織文件妥善地通過的決議的真實副本；
已妥善地記錄在公司的會議記錄冊之上；及
繼續全面生效及並沒有採取任何行動以撤銷或修訂該等決議案。
獲公司正式授權的代表
